header_validation.title_text: (2) REMOTE ACCESS | PROTECTION OF CONFIDENTIALITY AND INTEGRITY USING ENCRYPTION

raw.text: (2) REMOTE ACCESS | PROTECTION OF CONFIDENTIALITY AND INTEGRITY USING ENCRYPTION

blocks.text: (2) REMOTE ACCESS | PROTECTION OF CONFIDENTIALITY AND INTEGRITY USING ENCRYPTION

header_validation.title_text: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to protect the confidentiality and integrity of

raw.text: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to protect the confidentiality and integrity of remote access sessions.

blocks.text: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to protect the confidentiality and integrity of remote access sessions.

header_validation.title_text: Discussion:  Virtual private networks can be used to protect the confidentiality and integrity

raw.text: Discussion:  Virtual private networks can be used to protect the confidentiality and integrity of remote access sessions. Transport Layer Security (TLS) is an example of a cryptographic protocol that provides end-to-end communications security over networks and is used for Internet communications and online transactions.

blocks.text: Discussion: Virtual private networks can be used to protect the confidentiality and integrity of remote access sessions. Transport Layer Security (TLS) is an example of a cryptographic protocol that provides end-to-end communications security over networks and is used for Internet communications and online transactions.

header_validation.title_text: (3) REMOTE ACCESS | MANAGED ACCESS CONTROL POINTS

raw.text: (3) REMOTE ACCESS | MANAGED ACCESS CONTROL POINTS

blocks.text: (3) REMOTE ACCESS | MANAGED ACCESS CONTROL POINTS

header_validation.title_text: Route remote accesses through authorized and managed network access control points.

raw.text: Route remote accesses through authorized and managed network access control points.

blocks.text: Route remote accesses through authorized and managed network access control points.

raw.text: Discussion:  Organizations consider the Trusted Internet Connections (TIC) initiative [DHS TIC] requirements for external network connections since limiting the number of access control points for remote access reduces attack surfaces.

blocks.text: Discussion: Organizations consider the Trusted Internet Connections (TIC) initiative [DHS TIC] requirements for external network connections since limiting the number of access control points for remote access reduces attack surfaces.

blocks.text: Related Controls: SC-7.

header_validation.title_text: (4) REMOTE ACCESS | PRIVILEGED COMMANDS AND ACCESS

raw.text: (4) REMOTE ACCESS | PRIVILEGED COMMANDS AND ACCESS

blocks.text: (4) REMOTE ACCESS | PRIVILEGED COMMANDS AND ACCESS

header_validation.title_text: (a) Authorize the execution of privileged commands and access to security-relevant

raw.text: (a) Authorize the execution of privileged commands and access to security-relevant information via remote access only in a format that provides assessable evidence and for the following needs: [Assignment: organization-defined needs]; and

blocks.text: (a) Authorize the execution of privileged commands and access to security-relevant information via remote access only in a format that provides assessable evidence and for the following needs: [Assignment: organization-defined needs]; and

header_validation.title_text: (b) Document the rationale for remote access in the security plan for the system.

raw.text: (b) Document the rationale for remote access in the security plan for the system.

blocks.text: (b) Document the rationale for remote access in the security plan for the system.

raw.text: Discussion:  Remote access to systems represents a significant potential vulnerability that can be exploited by adversaries. As such, restricting the execution of privileged commands and access to security-relevant information via remote access reduces the exposure of the organization and the susceptibility to threats by adversaries to the remote access capability.

blocks.text: Discussion: Remote access to systems represents a significant potential vulnerability that can be exploited by adversaries. As such, restricting the execution of privileged commands and access to security-relevant information via remote access reduces the exposure of the organization and the susceptibility to threats by adversaries to the remote access capability.

blocks.text: (6) REMOTE ACCESS | PROTECTION OF MECHANISM INFORMATION

header_validation.title_text: Protect information about remote access mechanisms from unauthorized use and

raw.text: Protect information about remote access mechanisms from unauthorized use and disclosure.

blocks.text: Protect information about remote access mechanisms from unauthorized use and disclosure.

raw.text: Discussion:  Remote access to organizational information by non-organizational entities can increase the risk of unauthorized use and disclosure about remote access mechanisms. The organization considers including remote access requirements in the information exchange agreements with other organizations, as applicable. Remote access requirements can also be included in rules of behavior (see PL-4) and access agreements (see PS-6).

blocks.text: Discussion: Remote access to organizational information by non-organizational entities can increase the risk of unauthorized use and disclosure about remote access mechanisms. The organization considers including remote access requirements in the information exchange agreements with other organizations, as applicable. Remote access requirements can also be included in rules of behavior (see PL-4) and access agreements (see PS-6).
